title: Bi-prediction blending using non-scalar template-based blending parameters
abstract: Systems, methods, and instrumentalities described herein may involve bi-prediction blending using non- scalar template-based blending parameters. In examples, a device (e.g., a video encoding and/or decoding device may) receive a block. The device may determine one or more reference blocks. The device may determine one or more linear spatial convolutional filters. The device may derive one or more prediction samples of the block by applying the one or more linear spatial convolutional filters to the one or more prediction samples or the one or more reference blocks.
